title: Squirrel Removal in Rye, NY
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Rye, NY. Humane extraction, exclusion & damage repair for homes in Westchester. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Squirrels in Rye's historic homes and estates can cause significant damage to attics, soffits, and insulation. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Rye, from the picturesque neighborhoods near Playland to the waterfront properties along Long Island Sound. Our humane removal process protects your Westchester home while ensuring these persistent rodents don't return.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Westchester County, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique challenges of squirrel infestations in Rye's mix of historic estates and modern residences. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods and provide thorough exclusion work to prevent future entry, all backed by our service guarantee.
localContext: Rye's mature oak and maple trees, beautiful parks like Marshlands Conservancy, and proximity to wooded areas create ideal squirrel habitat, often leading these animals to seek shelter in attics and chimneys of nearby homes. The city's many Tudor and Colonial-style homes with complex rooflines provide numerous entry points that require expert identification and sealing.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Rye, NY?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Rye typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Rye properties.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Rye attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying noises in the attic during early morning or late afternoon, visible damage to soffits or vents, chewed electrical wiring, torn insulation, and droppings in the attic space. You may also notice squirrels entering and exiting through gaps in your roofline or chimney.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Rye humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane trapping and exclusion methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Our process focuses on live trapping when necessary and one-way exclusion devices that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter. We never use poisons or methods that cause unnecessary harm to the animals.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Rye home?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Rye service calls within 24 hours for inspections. The removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and entry points. After removal, we complete exclusion work and repairs to ensure your home is completely sealed and protected from future infestations.
